# Appendix 1 {-}
'`

```{r results='asis'}
print_tab_summary <- function(x, y){
  kable(x) %>% 
    kableExtra::add_footnote(label = paste0('Comments: ', y[[1]]), notation = 'none') #this grabs the comments out
}

tabs <- mapply(print_tab_summary, x = tab_summary, y = tab_summary_comments)
```

`r knit(text = unlist(tabs))`
